name: Kubernetes Unauthorized or Unauthenticated Access
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: kelnage
SIGMA Title: Kubernetes Unauthorized or Unauthenticated Access
SIGMA Description: Detects when a request to the Kubernetes API is rejected due to lack of authorization or due to an expired authentication token being used.
This may indicate an attacker attempting to leverage credentials they have obtained.


False positives:
- A misconfigured RBAC policy, a mistake by a valid user, or a wider issue with authentication tokens can also generate these errors.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%responsestatus.code%401%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%responsestatus.code%403%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Kubernetes Unauthorized or Unauthenticated Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%responsestatus.code%401%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%responsestatus.code%403%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Kubernetes Unauthorized or Unauthenticated Access
